event: A man standing by an ornate archway entrance
description: A man in a white robe and turban stands in a horseshoe-shaped stone archway decorated with elaborate tile work in geometric patterns of blue, green, and gold. He holds a small object in his hands and looks slightly to his left. Pink flowering vines climb over the top of the arch. Through the archway, bare trees and a warm sky are visible. To the left of the entrance, a second figure sits on a low bench draped with a red cloth. A hanging brass lantern is suspended from the arch above. The walls are warm ochre and terra-cotta in color.
